title: Agentic Commerce Skills
oneLiner: Open skills and plugins for agentic commerce protocols, checkout, and ecommerce workflows.
summary: Agentic Commerce Skills is an open repository from OrcaQubits covering commerce-focused agent skills and plugins for protocols, checkout, payments, and ecommerce integrations.
whyItMatters: Agentic Commerce Skills matters because commerce is one of the first places agents need domain-specific procedure, not just general browsing. Checkout, payments, product feeds, and storefronts all need structured rules.
bestFor: Ecommerce teams testing agent-facing checkout or protocol concepts
Developers who want skill examples for payments and commerce integrations
notFor: Users who want a fully managed consumer product with no setup work
Teams that cannot review the linked source, license, and operational requirements before adoption
seoTitle: Agentic Commerce Skills: Skills resource for open AI builders
seoDescription: Agentic Commerce Skills profile on OpenAgent.bot: what it is, when to use it, official links, open-source status, and structured resource data.
shareDescription: Open skills and plugins for agentic commerce protocols, checkout, and ecommerce workflows.

coreStrengths.title: Commerce-specific domain knowledge
coreStrengths.description: The repository focuses on protocols and workflows around agentic commerce.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: Commerce agents need clear rules around payment, checkout, inventory, and platform APIs.

coreStrengths.title: Skills plus plugins orientation
coreStrengths.description: It packages knowledge in forms agents can use as procedural guidance.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: Agents work better when domain instructions are reusable and scoped.

coreStrengths.title: Protocol-aware positioning
coreStrengths.description: The project references emerging agent commerce and payment protocols.
coreStrengths.whyItMatters: This helps builders track a fast-moving area where standards are still forming.

useCaseNotes.title: Agentic checkout prototypes
useCaseNotes.description: Explore how agents might handle shopping, checkout, and payment flows.

useCaseNotes.title: Commerce protocol research
useCaseNotes.description: Use the skills to understand UCP, ACP, AP2, and adjacent protocol ideas.

useCaseNotes.title: Ecommerce integration guidance
useCaseNotes.description: Give coding agents more domain context when working with Shopify, Stripe, or storefront APIs.

compareNotes.title: Use it when commerce context matters
compareNotes.summary: Generic skills do not encode the special constraints of checkout, payment, and product feed workflows.

commandLine.label: Clone the repository
commandLine.description: Review each skill or plugin before installing it into an agent environment.
